summary: Comprehensive testing of BC Receipt Capture feature (iteration_80). Backend: 13 tests passed, 3 skipped. Frontend: All UI elements verified. POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/bc-receipt advances ordered supply to received via transition_supply_status pipeline, creates ledger movements, sets bc_receipt_at/bc_receipt_notes. Receipt summary enrichment on draft detail and linked supply endpoints working. Frontend Record Receipt button/form visible when ordered supply exists, Received column in linked supply table.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/bc-receipt returns 404 for nonexistent draft
Backend: Receipt rejected with 422 when bc_response_status != 'created'
Backend: Duplicate receipt is idempotent (returns skipped, not error)
Backend: PO draft detail returns linked_supply_received_count enrichment
Backend: PO draft detail returns linked_supply_ordered_count enrichment
Backend: PO draft detail returns linked_supply_total_qty enrichment
Backend: PO draft detail returns linked_supply_received_qty enrichment
Backend: Linked supply endpoint returns receipt_summary object
Backend: Received supply records have bc_receipt_at field set
Backend: Full receipt flow creates ledger movement (receipt_movement_id returned)
Backend REGRESSION: BC response capture still works
Backend REGRESSION: Submission log still works
Backend REGRESSION: Vendor assignment still works
Backend REGRESSION: BC export still works
Backend REGRESSION: Linked supply endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Balances endpoint still works
Frontend: Linked Incoming Supply section visible in PO Draft detail drawer
Frontend: Linked supply table has Item, Qty, Status, BC PO#, Received columns
Frontend: Receipt summary shows Total, Received qty, Ordered count, Received count
Frontend: Linked supply rows show bc_receipt_at date in Received column
Frontend: Record Receipt button shows when ordered supply exists (not shown when all received)
Frontend: BC Response section shows created status badge with BC PO#
skipped_tests: Backend: test_partial_receipt_rejected (no ordered supply with qty > 1)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1444-1548: POST /po-drafts/{id}/bc-receipt endpoint correctly validates bc_response_status=created, linked supply existence, full qty match (partial/over receipt rejected 422), uses transition_supply_status pipeline for ordered->received
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1515-1531: Receipt uses transition_supply_status which auto-creates receipt ledger movement, sets bc_receipt_at and bc_receipt_notes on supply records

Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1043-1059: PO draft detail enriched with linked_supply_received_count, linked_supply_ordered_count, linked_supply_total_qty, linked_supply_received_qty via MongoDB aggregation
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1416-1431: Linked supply endpoint returns receipt_summary object with received_count, ordered_count, total_qty, received_qty
Frontend PODraftDetailDrawer Lines 1447-1479: recordReceipt function calls POST bc-receipt with ordered lines and receipt_notes
Frontend Linked Supply section Lines 1732-1757: Table includes Received column showing bc_receipt_at date
Frontend Lines 1761-1767: Receipt summary displays Total qty, Received qty, Ordered count, Received count
Frontend Lines 1791-1821: Record Receipt button visible when hasOrderedSupply, opens form with item list, notes input, confirm/cancel buttons

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed, 3 skipped due to test data constraints)

seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (customer_id: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8). Draft PO-DRAFT-20260314163256-689B67 (Vendor: V10045/Acme Bottle Supply, bc_response_status=created with bc_po_number=PO-9999) has 2 fully received supply records (SPAM-LITE: 1,549, TEST-ITEM-WARN: 5,010) with bc_receipt_at set to 3/14/2026.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BC Receipt Capture feature fully tested. Endpoint POST /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/bc-receipt requires: 1) draft exists (404), 2) bc_response_status=created (422), 3) linked supply records exist (422), 4) full qty receipt only (partial/over rejected 422). Uses transition_supply_status from inventory_so_integration.py which creates receipt ledger movement. Sets bc_receipt_at and bc_receipt_notes on supply records. Draft detail enriched with linked_supply_received_count, linked_supply_ordered_count, linked_supply_total_qty, linked_supply_received_qty. Linked supply endpoint returns receipt_summary. Frontend shows Received column in linked supply table, receipt summary below table, Record Receipt button when ordered supply exists. Draft 689B67 is fully received - to test receipt flow, create new draft with ordered supply.

errors.422: BC response status must be 'created' | No linked incoming supply | Over-receipt | Partial receipt | Receipt capture failed (all errors)
